query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS referralClicks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referrerId INT NOT NULL,
  referralCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  clickedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  convertedPartnerId INT NULL,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45) NULL,
  userAgent TEXT NULL,
  INDEX idx_referrerId (referrerId),
  INDEX idx_referralCode (referralCode)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS referralClicks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referrerId INT NOT NULL,
  referralCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  clickedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  convertedPartnerId INT NULL,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45) NULL,
  userAgent TEXT NULL,
  INDEX idx_referrerId (referrerId),
  INDEX idx_referralCode (referralCode)
);
